yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_June_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for June 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 206 Vulnerabilities Including Three P"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-15"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202612222_A_vulnerability_was_determi {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-12222: A vulnerability was determined in Yealink SIP-T46U 108.86.0.118."
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-15"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-12222" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "BlueToothTest" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
